title: Renewable Energy ROI Calculator
description: Industrial-grade ROI calculator for renewable energy investments, incorporating ISO 50001, Lean, and Six Sigma principles for energy efficiency and financial analysis.

inputs.label: System Capacity (kW)
inputs.businessContext: Total installed capacity of the renewable energy system (solar, wind, etc.)

businessContext_i18n.en: Total installed capacity of the renewable energy system (solar, wind, etc.)

inputs.label: Annual Energy Output (kWh)
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual electricity generation based on location, technology, and degradation factors

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual electricity generation based on location, technology, and degradation factors

inputs.label: Total Capital Cost (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total upfront investment including equipment, installation, permits, and commissioning

businessContext_i18n.en: Total upfront investment including equipment, installation, permits, and commissioning

inputs.label: Annual Operating & Maintenance Cost (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Recurring costs for maintenance, insurance, monitoring, and repairs

businessContext_i18n.en: Recurring costs for maintenance, insurance, monitoring, and repairs

inputs.label: Grid Electricity Price (USD/kWh)
inputs.businessContext: Current or projected price of grid electricity, used to calculate savings

businessContext_i18n.en: Current or projected price of grid electricity, used to calculate savings

inputs.label: Annual Inflation Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual inflation rate affecting future electricity prices and costs

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual inflation rate affecting future electricity prices and costs

inputs.label: Discount Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) or required rate of return

businessContext_i18n.en: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) or required rate of return

inputs.label: System Lifetime (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Expected operational life of the renewable energy system

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected operational life of the renewable energy system

inputs.label: Annual Degradation Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Annual reduction in energy output due to aging (e.g., solar panel degradation)

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual reduction in energy output due to aging (e.g., solar panel degradation)

inputs.label: Tax Credit / Incentive (%)
inputs.businessContext: One-time incentive or tax credit as percentage of capital cost (e.g., ITC)

businessContext_i18n.en: One-time incentive or tax credit as percentage of capital cost (e.g., ITC)

inputs.label: Carbon Credit Value (USD/ton CO2)
inputs.businessContext: Monetary value per ton of CO2 avoided, if applicable

businessContext_i18n.en: Monetary value per ton of CO2 avoided, if applicable

inputs.label: Energy Source Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of renewable energy technology for benchmarking and degradation curves

businessContext_i18n.en: Type of renewable energy technology for benchmarking and degradation curves

inputs.label: Include Carbon Benefits in ROI?
inputs.businessContext: Toggle to include or exclude carbon credit revenue in financial calculations

businessContext_i18n.en: Toggle to include or exclude carbon credit revenue in financial calculations

rules.message: Annual energy output seems low for the given capacity. Check capacity factor assumptions.
Degradation rate exceeds typical industry standards (ISO 50006). Verify manufacturer data.
Discount rate out of reasonable range for renewable projects.
Incentive percentage unusually high; verify local regulations.

thresholds.alert: Negative NPV: Project may not be financially viable under current assumptions.
IRR below discount rate: Investment does not meet required return threshold.
Payback period exceeds 75% of system lifetime. High financial risk.
